home.title: Qué Bárbaro
home.description: Your trusted barbershop and beauty center.

hero.body: A hair salon with standards, personalised attention and a high bar in every service. We work for those who want their hair to look great today, tomorrow and next week.

valueProposition.title: Personalised hairdressing for those who know what they want
valueProposition.body1: Not every head of hair needs the same thing, and not every client is looking for the same thing. At Qué Bárbaro that diversity is the starting point. Before beginning any service, we take the time to understand the texture, history, lifestyle and expectations of each person. That way the result not only looks good in the salon - it works at home too.
valueProposition.body2: That approach is what sets us apart as a reference for high-end hairdressing in Torremolinos for those who value truly personalised care.
valueProposition.headline:
You won't just come
to get a haircut.
valueProposition.subheadline: You'll come to unwind. To be pampered. To leave feeling more yourself.
valueProposition.body: Before we begin, we understand each client's texture, hair history and lifestyle. The result has to work in the salon and also at home.

blog.heroDescription: Hairdressing, colour, hair care and trends. Written by the salon team.
blog.notFoundDesc: The article you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.
blog.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, slug or author…

Cuidado capilar.description: Common questions about hydration, repair, frizz and home routines. We'll also cover GOA Organics, Keratin Infusion, Softy Mood, Sublime 10.31 and Bae Berry treatments, and how to know which one your hair really needs.

Coloración.description: Everything about balayage, blondes, highlights and colour correction. How to maintain the Brazilian Style and extend the time between salon visits so your colour keeps looking as good as the first day.

Rizos y método curly.description: Content specifically for curly hair: how to care for curls at home, which products work and why the Danza de Rizos cut makes a difference over a conventional cut.

Tendencias.description: Styles, shapes and changes that define the moment, always with a realistic eye on what actually works in the salon and in everyday life.

Eventos y ocasiones especiales.description: Tips for brides, hen parties, evening looks. How to prepare for a big event and get the most from Qué Bárbaro's services when the day really matters.

Noticias de Qué Bárbaro.description: Salon news, new services, new team members and everything that reinforces Qué Bárbaro's identity as a reference hairdresser in Torremolinos.

hero.title: Gallery
hero.subtitle: Qué Bárbaro
hero.description: Real results: colour, cuts, treatments, events and the salon interior. The best way to understand how we work.

espacio.title: The Qué Bárbaro space
espacio.description: The salon atmosphere is part of the experience.

eventos.title: Weddings, hen parties & celebrations
eventos.description: Weddings, hen and stag parties, birthdays. We coordinate hair, make-up and treatments so the whole group looks perfect.
eventos.cta: Have an event? We'll organise everything.

cta.title: Book your appointment
cta.description: Let the Qué Bárbaro team guide you.

contacto.title: Contact - Qué Bárbaro
contacto.intro: All the information to get in touch or find your way to the salon.
contacto.whereText: Our salon is in Torremolinos, Málaga. The location is convenient and accessible for local clients as well as people from surrounding areas looking for a salon with a more considered and personal approach.
contacto.hoursText: We work by appointment to ensure personalised attention and the time each service requires.
contacto.phoneText: For questions about services, availability or event packages, write to us or call us directly. We're here to help you find what you need.
contacto.followText: Follow the day-to-day of Qué Bárbaro, discover recent work and news through our social media. It's the quickest way to see what we're doing and get inspired before you visit.
contacto.mapsTitle: Qué Bárbaro location on Google Maps

cortes.name:
Design
Haircuts
cortes.description: Every cut is a masterpiece designed for you. We analyse your face shape, hair texture and lifestyle to craft a cut that truly represents you.

treatments.name: Artistic Design Cut
treatments.description: A signature cut that blends advanced technique with artistic vision. Every line, volume and texture is crafted with precision to create a unique result that defines your identity.

treatments.name: Curly Method "Dance of Curls"
treatments.description: A specialist method designed to unlock the natural beauty of your curly hair. We work with your hair's own curves to activate the curl, add definition and eliminate frizz.

peinados.name: Styling
peinados.description: The art of transforming hair into a style statement. From haute couture updos to cinematic waves, every style is a moment in itself.

treatments.name: Updo "Glamour Heights"
treatments.description: Haute couture updos that elevate any look to another level. From elegant buns to elaborate braided styles, every updo is designed with your silhouette and occasion in mind.

treatments.name: Hollywood Waves "Red Carpet"
treatments.description: Soft, luminous Hollywood waves that evoke the elegance of classic cinema. A style that combines timeless glamour with a sophistication that never goes unnoticed.

maquillaje.name: Makeup
maquillaje.description: We enhance your natural beauty with professional techniques tailored to every occasion - from mesmerising evening looks to the perfect makeup for the most important day of your life.

treatments.name: Glamour Night Makeup
treatments.description: An intense and sophisticated evening look that enhances your features and makes you shine in any setting. Contouring techniques, vivid pigments and long-lasting finishes.

treatments.name: "I'm getting married!" Makeup
treatments.description: The most special bridal makeup. We create the look you'll wear on the most important day of your life: perfect on camera, all-day lasting and true to who you are.

treatments.name: "Let's party!" Makeup
treatments.description: A festive, fun and personality-filled makeup look to make you the most radiant person at every celebration. Tailored to your style, your skin and the moment.

goa.name:
Goa
Organics
goa.description: Premium hair treatments using the Goa Organics range. Advanced formulas that transform, repair and beautify hair with the highest-quality organic ingredients.

treatments.name: Keratin Infusion Goa Organics
treatments.description: An intensive smoothing and nourishing treatment with Goa Organics keratin. Reduces volume, eliminates frizz and leaves hair soft, straight and shiny for weeks.

treatments.name: Softy Mood Goa Organics
treatments.description: A silky-effect nourishing treatment for damaged, dry or dull hair. It repairs the hair fibre from within and transforms the texture into an incredibly soft finish.

treatments.name: Sublime 10.31 Goa Organics
treatments.description: A colour and nourishment formula in one. Golden and beige tones that illuminate the hair with a sublime, natural and long-lasting result.

treatments.name: Bae Berry Goa Organics
treatments.description: A treatment with reddish and violet pigments that bring life, colour and shine to dull hair. A cocktail of nourishment and colour that transforms hair with a unique attitude.

rubios.name: Blondes
rubios.description: We are specialists in highlighting and colouring techniques for blondes that turn heads. From dreamy Brazilian balayages to silk babylights, we create the blonde of your life.

treatments.name: Brazilian Style Balayage
treatments.description: The most natural highlighting technique in the world, hand-painted to achieve perfect colour transitions. A vibrant, luminous blonde with no visible roots.

treatments.name: Babylights "Silk Shine"
treatments.description: Ultra-fine highlights that mimic the natural blonde of childhood. A soft result, full of silky shimmer and shine that looks sun-kissed.

treatments.name: Dazzling Blonde Balayage
treatments.description: A high-intensity balayage for those who want a striking, luminous and impactful blonde. Perfect contrast between base and tips for a cinematic result.

evento.name: Events
evento.description: We turn your most special moments into eternal memories. Our team gives everything to make sure you and your loved ones shine the way you deserve.

treatments.name: Brides & Grooms Package
treatments.description: The most complete package for your big day. Hair, makeup and all the care you and your wedding party deserve. Pre-event consultation included so everything goes perfectly.

treatments.name: Hen & Stag Party Packages
treatments.description: A moment to celebrate, enjoy and feel incredible. Group packages with hair and makeup so the whole squad arrives ready to party.

treatments.name: Birthday Packages
treatments.description: Because birthdays deserve to be celebrated in style. Personalised beauty packages so the birthday person and their group shine at the celebration.

hero.title: The salon
hero.body: A salon with its own identity in Torremolinos: elegant without being cold, technical without feeling distant. Born from a simple idea: that hairdressing can be done better.

historia.eyebrow: How Qué Bárbaro came to be
historia.title: Story
historia.body: We built the salon from a constant pursuit of quality: in the cut, colouring, hair diagnosis, the treatment and the atmosphere. In an industry where speed often wins, we chose to work with time, listening and judgement.

experiencia.body: We want every visit to the salon to be a real pause. We take care of the atmosphere, the pace of the appointment and the guidance from the very first moment.
experiencia.quote2: So does how you get there.

pillars.title: The atmosphere
pillars.desc: A space designed to make you feel comfortable from the moment you walk in.

pillars.title: The pace
pillars.desc: Unhurried appointments. Every service has its time.

pillars.title: The guidance
pillars.desc: We guide you from diagnosis to the final result.

equipo.title: Who we are
equipo.intro: Behind the salon are professionals who understand hairdressing as a craft, as aesthetic sensibility and as work done well.

members.name: Missael Lundqvist
members.bio: Leads the salon's vision with an eye for detail and an obsession with quality service.

members.name: Aurelio Tabares
members.bio: Expert in hair treatments: Sublime 10.31, Bae Berry, Softy Mood and Keratin Infusion.

members.name: Antonio
members.bio: Masters all cut and colour services. The team's technical reference.

members.name: Carmen
members.bio: Specialised in cuts, styling, colour techniques, GOA treatments, make-up, manicure and pedicure.

goa.desc: To address every hair need with precision and visible results from the very first session.

oribe.desc: A more luxurious, sensorial dimension for those seeking a more exclusive salon experience.

ghd.desc: High-performance styling tools for professional, long-lasting results every time.

depot.desc: Precision male grooming: advanced formulas for hair and beard care.

schwarzkopf.desc: World-reference color and hydration with over 120 years of hairdressing tradition.

cta.title: Book your appointment
cta.subtitle: We will be delighted to advise you from the very first moment and help you find the service that best suits you.

testimonials.label: What our clients say
testimonials.joinUs: Have you visited the salon? Your opinion matters to us.

ctaSection.headline:
Ready for
the experience?
ctaSection.subtitle: Choose how you prefer to contact us.

homeBrands.label: Brands
homeBrands.title:
Only the best
on your hair.
homeBrands.text: We work exclusively with brands that share our philosophy: real performance, quality ingredients and results that last.

experienceSection.label: The space · Qué Bárbaro
experienceSection.ticker: Quality · Technique · Personalised care · Torremolinos · Boutique salon · High-end hairdressing ·
experienceSection.body1: Qué Bárbaro is not just a boutique hair salon. It is an elegant, calm space with its own aesthetic vision, where every detail of the process is part of the result. From the welcome to the final finish, we take care of the pace, the atmosphere and the treatment so that coming to the salon is a pause worth taking.
experienceSection.body2: That combination of technique and experience is what makes us one of the reference salons in Torremolinos for those who seek quality, not volume.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions

items.a: Yes. We recommend booking in advance so we can give each client the time they need.

items.q: Do you do balayage and blonde services?
items.a: Yes. We offer Brazilian Style Balayage, Babylights Silk Shine and Dazzling Blonde Balayage.
Yes. With GOA Organics: Keratin Infusion, Softy Mood, Sublime 10.31 and Bae Berry.

items.q: Do you have packages for events?
items.a: Yes. Weddings, hen & stag dos, and birthdays. Get in touch and we'll organise everything.

faq.cta: Have more questions? Write to us →

pricing.note: Colour and treatments may vary by length and technical work. We'll advise you before you book.

homeContact.mapTitle: Map of ¡Qué Bárbaro! Hair & Care Salon in Torremolinos

hero.title: Hair and beauty services
hero.body: A selection of services focused on results and hair health. We work with a prior diagnosis, premium products and the time each service requires.

cortes.title: Cuts & styling
cortes.intro: Every cut is thought through before it is executed: face structure, hair texture, lifestyle and upkeep. The result has to be yours.

services.name: Artístico Design
services.desc: Advanced, creative, fully personalised design cut. We find a shape that suits you, defines you and works effortlessly every day.

services.name: Danza de Rizos
services.desc: Curly method for wavy and curly hair. Well-defined curls with structure, movement and no frizz. Fully personalised to each client's curl pattern.

services.name: Glamour en Altura
services.desc: Elegant, well-constructed updos for weddings, events, galas or any special occasion.

services.name: Alfombra Roja
services.desc: Hollywood waves: cinematic, luminous finish, silky hair, controlled volume and visible shine.

color.title: Colour
color.intro: We start with diagnosis: base, hair history, skin tone and end goal. Colour looks better when there is thinking behind it.

services.name: Balayage Estilo Brasileño
services.desc: Sun-kissed hair effect with soft transitions and a natural result that suits almost any base tone.

services.name: Babylights Silk Shine
services.desc: Ultra-fine highlights applied with precision for subtle luminosity and a silky finish. For those who want shine and dimension without a drastic change.

services.name: Balayage Rubio Deslumbrante
services.desc: Luminous, bold and well-executed blonde. Controlled bleaching and precise toning for a blonde that shines without looking artificial.

tratamientos.title: Treatments
tratamientos.intro: We always start with a diagnosis. Visible results from the first session.

services.name: Keratin Infusion
services.desc: Progressively smooths, softens and reduces frizz. More manageable, shinier hair with a noticeably improved texture.

services.name: Softy Mood
services.desc: Deep hydration. Restores the hair's elasticity, silky feel and the sensation of healthy hair from the first wash.

services.name: Sublime 10.31
services.desc: Intensive hair reconstruction for damaged or weakened hair. Reinforces the fibre, restores consistency and improves heat response.

services.name: Bae Berry
services.desc: Nutrition, shine and scalp wellbeing. A treatment that also works on your senses.

maquillaje.title: Make-up
maquillaje.intro: Part of the complete image concept. The same criteria and level of detail as with hair.

services.name: Glamour Noche
services.desc: Intensity, impeccable finish and presence that lasts from start to finish of the night.

services.name: ¡Ay que me caso!
services.desc: Bridal make-up: long-lasting, luminous and fully adapted to your style. So you recognise yourself in every photograph.

services.name: ¡Me voy de fiesta!
services.desc: Fresh, fun and full of personality. To shine effortlessly at nights out, events or celebrations.

manicura.title: Manicure
manicura.intro: Hand and foot care with the same quality standard we apply to every service.

services.name: Manicure
services.desc: Complete hand care: filing, cuticles and polish. An impeccable finish that lasts.

services.name: Pedicure
services.desc: Full foot treatment: exfoliation, hydration and polish. The care they deserve.

reserva.title: Ready to start?
reserva.body: Looking for a thoughtful cut, well-crafted colour or a treatment to improve your hair? Book your appointment and let the team guide you.

eventos.title: Events
eventos.description: We make every special moment shine. We design bespoke beauty experiences for the most important days of your life.

packs.title: Bridal Pack
packs.description: A unique day deserves unique preparation. Bridal hair and make-up with a prior trial included, so you arrive at the altar feeling perfect.

packs.title: Hen Party Pack
packs.description: Because the last night of being single has to be memorable. Hair, make-up and special touches for the whole group.

packs.title: Celebration Pack
packs.description: Treat yourself or someone you love to a full beauty session to celebrate in style. Perfect for birthdays, anniversaries or any special occasion.
